prerequisites: Your Flowlu company subdomain, taken from your account URL (for example, "mycompany" from https://mycompany.flowlu.com).
An API key generated in your Flowlu account with access to the modules you want to sync.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a Flowlu API key. The key is created in your account's API Settings and is passed as the api_key parameter on each request. Provide it in the connector's api_key field along with your company subdomain.

setupSteps.title: Sign in and open API Settings
setupSteps.body: Log in to your Flowlu account, click your profile picture in the top right, and go to Portal Settings, then API Settings (System Settings, then API Settings).

setupSteps.title: Create an API key
setupSteps.body: Create a new API key, give it a name, and grant it access to the modules you intend to read. Copy the generated key and paste it into the connector's api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Set your company subdomain
setupSteps.body: Find your Flowlu account URL (for example https://mycompany.flowlu.com) and enter the subdomain portion (mycompany) in the connector's company field. This determines the API base URL https://{company}.flowlu.com/api/v1.

sources.title: Getting Started with the CData Excel Add-In for Flowlu
